chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Bail Application No.2646 of 2024 ______________________________________________________________ Date Order With Signature Of Judge ______________________________________________________________ For hg of bail appln 24.01.2025. Mr. S.M. Nehal Hashmi, advocate for applicant. Mr. Salim Akhtar Buriro, Addl. Prosecutor General. Complainant is present in person. MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J:- Allegation against the applicant is that he was in relation with wife of complainant and hence in order to commit murder of complainant, he fired upon him in street Shadman Town, Malir, Karachi on 27.08.2024. Complainant is present and he has been, as a first part of compensation, handed over Rs.3,00,000/- by Advocate of the applicant, who submits that applicant has compromised with the complainant. He further undertakes that no harm would be caused to the complainant in future and final settlement would be made before the trial Court. Learned Additional Prosecutor General, in view of above fact, has given no objection so also complainant, who however, submit that for final disposal of the case he may be referred to the trial Court which shall take into view the money spent by him on his treatment and compensation to him. Accordingly, in view of above, this application is allowed. The applicant is granted bail subject to furnishing a solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees Fifty Thousands only) with P.R. Bound of like amount to the satisfaction of the trial Court. However, for final settlement, the parties shall appear before the trial Court which shall take into consideration all aspects of the case.

Bound of like amount to the satisfaction of the trial Court. However, for final settlement, the parties shall appear before the trial Court which shall take into consideration all aspects of the case. The bail application is accordingly disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE HANIF
